decision: Static V2 qualification iteration passed local QA and is pending production verification after push. The iteration adds good-fit/not-fit launch guidance on / and email-readiness guidance in /pilot generated output and exported briefs while preserving pure Vibelytics route policy and static-only behavior.

monitoringHistory.summary: Static V2 qualification iteration implemented locally. / now includes good-fit/not-fit launch guidance for self-selection before the launch brief checklist. /pilot now includes When to email Vibelytics guidance and exported copied/downloaded/emailed launch briefs include an Email readiness line. Local build, JSON validation, forbidden-term scan, static-only scan, and the Mira K / London / 2,000-3,000 cap hall / Fashion pilot smoke test passed.

Static V2 growth/conversion production monitoring passed. / now includes a launch brief checklist and clearer CTA path to /pilot. /pilot includes a direct email-brief anchor, stronger input-panel guidance, a What to send Vibelytics output block, and copied/downloaded/emailed launch briefs now read as intake artifacts with scenario, generated decision, rationale, sequence, next inputs, requested follow-up, preview boundary, and share link. Canonical and Vercel / and /pilot matched local route files byte-for-byte. Local and production pilot smokes passed for Mira K / London / 2,000-3,000 cap hall / Fashion.

Static V2 production monitoring passed. Canonical / and /pilot returned 200 and matched local route files byte-for-byte. The homepage contained the strengthened promoter/venue positioning, example decisions, audience section, marketing themes, and trust boundaries. The pilot exposed budget, timeline, ticketing, and risk inputs; copy/download/share/email actions worked; the share URL restored the selected scenario; forbidden legacy terms and backend/API/external-service patterns were absent; npm build and JSON validation passed.

Docs-only production monitoring recheck passed after the historical signoff clarification commit. Production / and /pilot returned 200, live route HTML matched local route files, favicon/app/OG/Twitter image URLs resolved, / remained pure Vibelytics, /pilot retained only approved subtle SR007 static-pilot context, no backend/API/external-service behavior was found in route files or fetched production HTML, the production pilot interaction smoke test passed, npm build passed, and JSON validation passed.

Production monitoring passed for / and /pilot. Live route HTML matched local route files, favicon/app/OG/Twitter image URLs resolved, / remained pure Vibelytics, /pilot retained only approved SR007 static-pilot context, no backend/API/external-service behavior was found, and the pilot interaction smoke test passed.

acceptedRisks.decision: Internal evidence only; do not use in future public brand implementation unless provenance is resolved.

nextAction: Move to lightweight production monitoring and preservation. Re-run production QA after any route, token, or asset change.
